name: apply-agent
description: Local TypeScript Workday auto-apply agent with Proton Bridge integration and cluster Postgres deployment manifests.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run build --prefix web && node scripts/copy-public.mjs
scripts.container: docker build --target=web -t ${IMAGE_REGISTRY:-ghcr.io/danieljcheung}/apply-agent-web:${TAG:-0.1.0} . && docker build --target=api -t ${IMAGE_REGISTRY:-ghcr.io/danieljcheung}/apply-agent-api:${TAG:-0.1.0} . && docker build --target=worker -t ${IMAGE_REGISTRY:-ghcr.io/danieljcheung}/apply-agent-worker:${TAG:-0.1.0} .
